title: Network security controls
text: Processes and mechanisms for installing and maintaining network security controls shall be defined and understood.

title: Protect stored account data
text: Primary account numbers and sensitive authentication data shall be protected when stored, including use of strong cryptography and access controls.

title: Mask PAN when displayed
text: The PAN shall be masked when displayed so only those with a legitimate business need can see more than the first six and last four digits.

title: Encrypt transmission of cardholder data
text: Strong cryptography and security protocols shall be used to safeguard sensitive cardholder data during transmission over open, public networks.

title: Restrict access by need-to-know
text: Access to system components and cardholder data shall be limited to only those individuals whose job requires such access.

title: Strong authentication
text: Strong user authentication shall be implemented for all access into the cardholder data environment, including multi-factor authentication where required.

title: Audit logging
text: Automated audit trails shall be implemented to reconstruct events, including user access, administrative actions, and invalid logical access attempts.

title: Incident response plan
text: An incident response plan shall be established and maintained to respond immediately to a system breach, including communication and recovery procedures.
